docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FLOWERS, SPENCER AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ERIKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLOWERS, SPENCER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ERIKA $3,746.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,836.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ERIKA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SPENCER FLOWERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIKA ORTIZ IS PRESENT. WITNESSES CHRISTINA GOMEZ AND LUIS TOBAR TESTIFY ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
